svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-027 reached 1.3582 val_bpb. 31 scored runs are tracked here, with 12 kept and 19 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260329-027 (keep) tested the untied frontier may still be too loosely calibrated, so a tighter `LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20` could improve it further.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
